resources.string:
SGPA (Semester Grade Point Average) is calculated by multiplying the grade points obtained in each course by its credits, summing these products, and dividing by the total credits of the semester.

Formula:
SGPA = Σ(Grade Points × Credits) / Σ(Total Credits)

CGPA (Cumulative Grade Point Average) is calculated by taking the sum of (SGPA × Credits) for all semesters and dividing it by the total credits earned so far.

Formula:
CGPA = Σ(SGPA × Credits) / Σ(Total Credits)

The goal tracker calculates the required SGPA for your current semester to reach a target CGPA.

Formula:
Required SGPA = (Target CGPA × Total Credits - Current CGPA × Earned Credits) / Current Semester Credits
